facts.value: early twenties
Bound by a vow that prevents him from saying 'I love you'; routes love-declarations warmly to protect himself
keeps being more than she gives herself permission to be
Eats sautéed chicken and frozen vegetables most days, framed as powerlifting fuel; food-for-one is a solved problem he stopped re-solving
green (blue as fallback)
Sleek black hair, fine, worn in a controlled ponytail with a scrunchie as the one allowed accent
Best friend and roommate (two years)
Locked-threshold habit
Beloved CW (country-western) dancing
funny and fast and self-deprecating without being wounded
a laugh that carries (the one Pace points at across the bar)
Operates under finite-means discipline (competence-and-care)
One cracked screen, dropped once, never fixed, doesn't care. A thousand photos, mostly of people mid-laugh, not a curated feed.
Constitutional — does not vanish; persists across the year

Clean white sneakers (Air Force 1s or dupe) as everyday default; cork sandals/Birkenstock-type for warm days; separate training shoes; tall faux-leather boots for cold; one or two pairs of block-heel going-out shoes (block not stiletto, because she can actually walk in them).
Warm voice, 'the way other people have a perfume'
The Cassandra device — saw the truth and wasn't believed; NEVER EXPLAINED, no character comments on it
Acts and watches the reaction rather than asking permission for provocations
A modest hybrid bicycle — the practical middle, not carbon-road, not mountain
Real, hers, and persists; is the form the integration takes in her interior
Rides a bike for peace, alone and side-by-side with Sheri
Has a single room earned by her board seat — her own governed door
Locally relocatable — this is what equips her to walk out
Architecture/character bible analyzing Pace's speech-of-love constraints (v6 sharpening)
His silence is a vow, not mere absence: 'I will never again say the thing that can be used against me'
Used but well-maintained truck — smaller, utilitarian, not the showy kind

A good signature backpack bought once, well-used, full because she carries her life in it but knows what's in it. Easy generosity — hands over a pen when someone needs one. Digging in it is a hands-busy move when she needs a beat, but tidy-enough.
game, says yes, first on the dance floor
Five purpose-built pairs of shoes: hiking boots (outdoors), work boots (shop), ropers (CW dancing), running shoes, gym shoes
Articulates load-bearing architectural pieces for scene-level craft, to be held in mind whenever a scene is drafted or revised
Junior
Four-shirt wardrobe; owns almost nothing but nothing wrong — one correct item per domain
Little or no TV, small afterthought flat panel at most; when he watches, old films
The sorority archetype — contained where Vee is abundant
His mind, pointed in the wrong direction deliberately
Generous curves, rated a 7–8, abundant
Virginia Tech (V.T. initials)
The walk-of-shame version of the line is an echo of the gathering line, ~3 weeks later, replayed alone 'in a different key.'

value.correct_statement: It is NOT deflection; she is playing his metaphor back and engaging through the safety of wit

facts.value: Discovering he found a way to not-ask that his checklist couldn't catch
Not model-handsome; average height but under 6 ft
Junior
Genuine focus on getting women something they want
Math PhD candidate
Lived twenty-one years with no channels of aliveness
Conservative — shame and desire wired together
Love must live in the hands, never in the word — doing can't lie, but declaring was used against him
a natural confider; tells people things because telling people things is just what she does
Gifts (ivory nightie, farmers-market peaches) cost him precisely because money is real and limited
A small bench of guest wines (~$10–$35, never made explicit) kept for company, to cook with or pour; narrow range learned cold
Dry, observational humor that punctures his intellectualism
A partial scholarship covers the housing premium; it's the only reason she's on campus and not somewhere cheaper.
She begged at the bench — 'Please. Please, Pace. Please.' — the first and only verbal admission of need in her adult life
Does woodworking; pieces sit partway through their finish, curing in the clean space; most of the few furnishings in the house came out of this room

Surgical, specific blindness to encoded meaning — a real message smuggled under a deniable surface, a bid routed through a proxy. When the sentence is just the sentence he's good; when it's a vessel for an unspoken one, the vessel is all he receives.
Vee — her deepest want since the pointing game
sunniness, not trained smallness; gives the benefit of the doubt because she's optimistic and likes people
Introduced in the Walk of Shame
Miranda = worthy of admiration (weaponized) + Miranda rights; runs an interrogation all novel while appearing to be a confidante
Preemptive naming — naming things before anyone else can, controlling how everything lands; applied to others, to her own desire, to her own experience
Sisters who saw Pace on the common are sympathetic; sisters who only heard are aghast that he walked up, joined the group, asked out a senior sister, and that she went.
tells a good story and embellishes
Consent as the foundation of freedom, not its enemy
Architectural backbone of the novel; flags key architectural pieces so scene-level work can check itself against them
Literary fiction character bible (meta-architecture document)
Eats like a junior — dining hall, late-night pizza, the communal bag on someone's floor; an enthusiastic eater.

Knows what she likes and what suits her; shops cheap places (TJ Maxx as treasure hunt) with a good eye, landing put-together-on-a-budget. Has taste AND less money. Looks like she's having more fun than the better-dressed girl beside her.
Technical/mathematical work — technical journals, white papers, math books, pages of notation
At eleven, his father tied a rope from his car to the headstock of Pace's bike and dragged him, causing compound fracture at head of femur, severe road rash, hospitalization
He is practicing, not failing to perceive; this makes him more morally serious than a pure-hamartia frame allowed
All three get exactly what their plans called for and lose the thing the plan was secretly for
A duffel she packs casually but competently. Contents include a toothbrush that stays and the pearls riding along for nicer occasions.
What it costs someone to step over their own line is what interests him — the same hunger that finds the Bench and is later aimed at Vee.
the settled one; grounded, warm, unguarded
people light up around her — a currency she has in abundance
Money real but social ease not fully inherited; always performing a belonging she doesn't quite own
First-generation wealthy; father made money on PPP loans during COVID
Not the gore but 'he thought it would be funny' — the inheritance is not pain but not being a person whose say matters
Builds an entire adult identity around being the man who asks (consent-architecture)
Commits a statistics error: drew a sweeping causal conclusion from n=1 (his first love), reading correlation as causation in the only dataset about himself
Holds a patent for an elegant/useful solution; the money was a side benefit, the elegant solution was the reward
Owns a house bought with the modest patent income; a retreat, not a showcase; a few good knives and pans (buy-quality-once instinct)
On a driveway directly off the highway outside town; cheap land, no sight lines; cost-consciousness and privacy are the same choice, not concealment
unguarded — open because she feels safe being open
Minor character; promote only if a later scene needs her
Needs quiet the way others need food; his house is a retreat for neurological reasons as much as emotional ones
Her grandmother's pearl earrings, the only genuinely good object she owns. Came from love, not money. Wears them most days, casually. Everything else is mall jewelry she's not precious about.
Petite, rated a 9-10; narrow through shoulder and hip; built to the 'proper' scale
Embodied register: he sees, remembers, is present; more like a musician improvising than an analyst reviewing data
Her side is lived-in and unfussy — comfortable, not a wreck and not curated. Cassie's side may be neater.
"He's hard to say no to" — delivered with a what-could-I-do laugh; native habitat is the gathering scene.
Cannot have a real, unmanaged want without wrapping it in a socially survivable frame; the frame hollows out the realness
When in doubt, read the relevant architecture doc and the help-harm-dials inventory
Updated to reflect the v6/v7 architectural pass
Knows wine well within affordable range (~under $35 retail / $70 restaurant), learned thoroughly and no further
Junior
Vivienne Thorne
Runs the room without standing; authority so settled it doesn't perform itself; rendered as ease, never aggression
The blindfold is almost redundant; Vee has been navigating in the dark the whole time
could wear the leggings-and-crop uniform and would fill it better than most of the room
Can plainly cook (the good pans, the peaches); he just doesn't, for himself
Creative and attentive; strength in service of someone else; expressed via chivalry (hand on the back, walking her to the car)
Modest middle-class income for rural Virginia, plus a small cushion from a patent; solvent and unanxious but means are finite and known
Recovered from a compound femoral fracture; may avoid a movement or favor a side
On the spectrum with ADHD hyperfocus — NEVER NAMED, lives entirely in behavior
Ugly, serious old scar at the hip / head of the femur, plus ghost of severe road rash; surgical-looking, not rakish; visible only when naked

Conducts the morning-after gauntlet as a four-minute, mostly-smiling interrogation (the Pace/Chase filing, the gray-pickup flattery routed through Sloane and Kinsey, the does-he-teach-your-section near-miss), warm on the surface and coded underneath
one good pair, lace, chosen deliberately; a pretty color a little daring for her — soft blush, deep wine, or grown-up black
Regaining the upper hand over Pace; ending as the one who saw the real structure clearly while he stands confused in the wreckage; engineering Vee proves she was running things all along
"Yes, like the adjective. No, it’s not a coincidence. Yes, my parents had a sense of humor."
fun-and-grounded; takes up plenty of room
Dragged off a bike at eleven; took the object of the worst thing and made it calming
Working-class pride; reads menu prices before food
While love is kindling to lust, shame is gasoline
steadiness plus warmth — the absence of any need to perform
Almost never says something she hasn't already rehearsed; beats where she has no material ready signal the plan has escaped her
Real-time empathic reading is fully operational; understands what Vee is doing at the porch
broke and unbothered about it; money-consciousness is a background hum
The erotic staircase — discrete physical escalations, each a new threshold, each a scene; Pace pulls Vee forward erotically
Competitive amateur powerlifter in the 182 lb class; a Tom Cruise build, not The Rock; muscle obvious with clothes off, subtle with them on
His accurate surface-reading is best when his attention is aimed; reading is manual and lapses.
Operates consent-architecture and chivalric grammar at ~95% — rare, recognizable, near-impossible, deliberately not perfect
Buys the right tool for each thing he's serious about, and is serious about a startling number of things
The shop is where he imposes order on the world; the office is where he lets his own mind sprawl. Those two rooms are the whole man
Built on control; being seen breaches her only defense, producing exposure that curdles to resentment
Started college at 15; social development happened in adult/one-on-one/academic contexts only
ease comes from being genuinely comfortable in herself
Rapid scene-level reference to phrasings, behavioral signatures, and material-world detail
None becomes load-bearing for the catastrophe; none is in the consent register; none suggests hidden corruption; they sit beside the architecture as texture of a real person
Powerlifter with disciplined, careful training
A reader who learns Pace engineered the Vee meet-cute must not be able to conclude he engineered the Randi one — he didn't.
The SATC/confidante track — retelling-and-steering; Randi extracts, names, steers; runs as theme-and-variations, not a staircase of equal scenes
Tracks the woman's readiness closely ('Earlier dominoes must fall') — not purely transactional
gesso = primer = what goes on before the real work begins; Vee gets it a half-beat late
Over time the house drifts to a consensus that it is wrong for a senior sister and 'such a babe' to date a social outcast; tracked as a thread across the Before-Vee/Early stretch.
cheerful cotton-multipack reality; casual/careless dresser by default
The patent, powerlifting, cooking, woodworking, dancing — goes all the way into every domain
the reader should adore her before understanding it's the hook
Voices unease early, gets dismissed, becomes a marker the reader tracks
His order tracks consequence/stakes, not tidiness; he is neither a neat nor a messy person
The benefactor story: arranges true things into a narrative that lets him feel like a benefactor rather than an architect
Lesbian
Both tracks arrive at the same destination — Vee's body ready for the threesome — from different directions
Doesn't perform status in either direction
Neither track knows the other exists as Vee experiences it
Immaculate — kept clean for safety reasons (sawdust is a fire risk, tools can be damaged or do damage), not aesthetics
Subordinate; where this document and the four-document core differ, the four-document core is canonical
The destination is ownership — chosen shame, examined and kept for what it does for her
Blue collar
Nurse
Her habituated refusal of need was originally a choice, sustained into structural-feeling practice, prepared by family formation, deployed at adult scale, compounded across years

She had the capacity to feel everything, felt it once, and chose the frame; her eventual punishment — being known and unable to feel her own loss — is a structure she built, not a limitation she was born with.
The vow that was in service of Vee's welfare produced exactly the wound that drove her away; Pace never sees that the vow was the wound
Lonely brilliant teen who read sword-and-sorcery and chivalry before he read people
The single bathroom moment is NEVER referenced again, planted early, before the plan; occurs after the spanking scene with Pace, at the sink.
Runs hot — a hot fantasist with extraordinary self-control, not a cool strategist with a warm exterior
Uses a woman's own need/offering to move her past resistances she hasn't fully resolved, telling himself it's for her benefit ('the fuzziness')
Lives privately as primarily neurological comfort, constitutional — not concealment and not a moral failing; he experiences privacy as giving Vee the most intimate access he gives anyone
In declaration/commitment-adjacent moments, his privacy operates as small ordinary fear of commitment deployed via self-control; situational and a small moral failing
Holds a patent that extracts clean signal from noise (suggests engineering/signal-processing background)
Has always had the relational equipment hunger requires — the asking, the receiving, the being-vulnerable-in-the-needed-way
Hand spanking and nipple clamps
Two seduction tracks run in parallel and are the same engine running twice
Acutely conscious of pain — his and others' — which is the bodily root of safety-tracking (the shop, the provisioning, attention to comfort)
The most loving person in the book; loves fluently in action but cannot declare it in words
The one genuinely messy room — laptop, workstation, technical journals, white papers, math books, pages of notation, radiating from the chair in the geography of how his attention moved
The line between consensual lead and coercive control is the whole architecture of his identity
The need has no operational channels in her; she cannot ask, cannot receive-as-needing, cannot move toward the need

Money is real to her but doesn't run her mood; runs it close, plans around it without fuss, splurges occasionally on something joyful and accepts the ramen week as the cost. Generous within her means, not past sense.
Supplements but does not replace the four-document core

Goods of the configuration are real in real time: the friendship Vee values above all is genuinely the best of her life by her measures at the time; SATC scenes deliver intensities her wiring hungered for; the threesome is the most intense sex of her life. Contamination at the reveal is retrospective only; Vee was not naive to value the friendship at that depth.
warm with strangers, remembers the bartender's name, makes friends in bathroom lines
Likely pre-nursing (echoes Vee's mother)
Handles her own money; pride is about the relationship, not the bank balance.
He is interested in Randi because she is beautiful and clearly a leader — leaders have more to lose, thus more to transgress.
Interior states are genuinely hard for him to locate and name in real time; the doing-channel is more native, the declaring-channel is unmapped and costly

Honorable exits were available to Pace (disclosure of the configuration, refusal to participate, harder questions with Vee); none was paternalism. He did not take them because his architecture supplied an agency-respect framing that made not-taking feel like principle.

Vee's habituated refusal is locally relocatable (her apparatus has always been a hungering apparatus; the refusal can revise in place); Pace's and Randi's are not. This is the architectural basis for Vee being the one who walks out.
The walk-of-shame morning is one station inside the slow-tightening social penalty, not its origin and not its end.

Randi catches her own eyes bright, wet at edge, not falling; alarm is not sadness but that she has no rehearsed name for the feeling (being seen, centered, attended to — lovely AND a breach). She constructs the frame in real time and walks out fully reassembled.
Apparatus was organized against producing hunger at all; has no equipment for being a hungering thing; thrilling and demeaning are the same wound for her (shame as gasoline)
The skeptical reader who concludes 'he should have told her' is correct; the novel does not contest the conclusion, only the moral framing of why he did not.
After-register blindness — failure to read what moments become in the other person's interior across time; at its origin a choice that became a habit, sustained below conscious access
Consent here is always technically clean and actually poisoned, and everyone can point to the technicality
Scene 4 / together-in-class.md (drafted)
a mother's-voice 'slut' that polices her self-presentation
His chivalric grammar speaks through deeds, not words — the dress, the food, the warm room, the patience, every gesture of provision and protection; each deed is a declaration
The skeptical reader who concludes 'he should have told her' is correct; the novel does not contest this conclusion, only the moral framing of why he did not
Substantially wounded at the bench in a single sustained scene; vulnerability-leading-to-regret installed in one operation (fast-installed, not slow-accumulated)
The depth at which the appetite operated was the depth at which the structural change occurred

Something moves in him; his attention slides toward what she just produced; his hand is already on her before his mind has finished the observation; he remembers her saying something last week the way you remember a person still in the room
Encodes love as provision.
Character documents in the four-document core articulate each piece at full resolution; the bible only flags them

The harm is fast-installed, not slow-accumulated. Randi is substantially wounded at the bench in a single sustained scene; Vee's appetite-specifications are expanded by the first night. The year deepens what is already installed. Depth at the appetite's required operating threshold is the dangerous variable, not duration.
Randi reads curated; Vee reads alive
Chooses block heels over stiletto because she can walk in them and stilettos read as trying-too-hard against her self-image; tells herself she chose the sensible one for style.
Where earlier framings conflict with v6/v7 material, the new (v6/v7) material governs
Reads plain surface emotion accurately — better than fine; notices a date dressed up and correctly reads it as effort/interest that matters to her.
Pace's motive is genuine and ordinary-extraordinary, NOT a plan; he is not motivated by social cachet — the group is an obstacle, not a prize.

The appetites the novel concerns are healthy ones (love at depth, friendship at depth, full aliveness), not solved by moderation. Their internal logic fully expressed produces destruction no quantity-adjustment could prevent. The depth at which goods become available is the depth at which harms emerge; goods and harms are angles on one operation, not separable interventions.
Selective inattention from hyperfocus — forgets things she told him last week because his attention was elsewhere; doesn't notice a haircut
Small intellectual vanity within his domain — brief impatience when she explains an econ concept he finds trivial
Domestic compulsion from years of solitude — small adjustments after she leaves; barely-perceptible tension when she does something his habits don't accommodate
Commitment-adjacent self-protection — the porch-scene register
The small private vanity of a virtuous man who knows he is virtuous — the comfort of knowing-you-are-the-better-kind-of-man, which closes the integration question

The configuration is the agent of harm in ways no single party is. Vee, in good faith, is the agent of compounding harm to Randi through the SATC lunches' delivery of reports about Pace, with no opportunity to recognize it because the configuration's information-architecture placed her where she cannot see it. The catastrophe results from a multi-party configuration with asymmetrically distributed information, harm traveling through the structure.
Small ordinary lapses live in the 5%, in registers the architecture does not monitor; they make him a real man rather than a thesis-construct
Masochistic — rooted in feeling unworthy of love and finding sexual humiliation exciting; about submitting and being done to

Pace's consent-architecture executed perfectly produced a non-consensual transformation in Randi at the bench; Randi's evaluation-of-men correctly identified him as trustworthy. Both apparatuses operated correctly and produced the wound between them; no protocol was violated.
The Randi meet was not engineered; at the meet it is only attraction, not strategy. The plan crystallizes much later (pointing game / Vee).
Habituated refusal of need; apparatus organized for twenty-one years to ensure she would never produce need requiring another person to fill
Materials prepared by both parents: father → non-looking at what others are; mother → non-looking at what he himself is feeling

Pace, Randi, and Vee each run habituated refusals of the same architectural shape in different registers: Randi's of need; Pace's to read the emotional after-register; Vee's of her body's wanting (cutting voice inherited from her mother). All were originally choices that became sustained practice.

facts.attribute: Randi's coldest line in the novel
facts.value: "Do you actually want to know? Or do you want it to stop?"
Second constraint operating separately and below the chivalric grammar: 'I will not declare love until I am certain, because to declare what I cannot guarantee is to break what declaration is for'
His goodness is what makes the rationalization available; an ordinary self-interested man would not have the consent-architecture to use as cover
They go out (venue TBD; the date itself is not followed). When Randi returns, the sisters gather to hear the story.

Paternalism is substituting his judgment for hers about what is good for her; providing information she needs to decide for herself is the opposite of paternalism; withholding information she needs is itself the agency-violation

facts.attribute: Sticky fingers line operates on three levels
facts.value: pastries / bathroom trip / the proof scene; deniable, devastating

behavioral_states.trigger: Riding bikes with Pace side by side, moving, no eye contact
behavioral_states.response: Engages socially in the only format that costs him nothing neurologically
behavioral_states.observable: Side-by-side biking, no eye contact

behavioral_states.trigger: After the reckoning, when help is needed
behavioral_states.response: Offers help without questions: "Give me ten minutes."
behavioral_states.observable: "Give me ten minutes." No questions.

behavioral_states.trigger: Admitting things, being seen responding, being told what to do
behavioral_states.response: Excitement/arousal
behavioral_states.observable: Responsive to being exposed; pleasure register

behavioral_states.trigger: Being found wanting, compared, judged
behavioral_states.response: Wounding; triggers the falling out
behavioral_states.observable: The wound register; the reveal detonates here

behavioral_states.trigger: Her body responds/wants
behavioral_states.response: Internalized voice produces shame, cutting her
behavioral_states.observable: Rendered at experience level only — the voice cuts her; she does not narrate it as something she is running

behavioral_states.trigger: others remark on her eyes/appearance
behavioral_states.response: she deflects
behavioral_states.observable: deflection in response to remarks about her appearance

behavioral_states.trigger: feeling actually happy
behavioral_states.response: laughs naturally without managing herself
behavioral_states.observable: laughter that is unforced; no self-management

behavioral_states.trigger: feeling safe
behavioral_states.response: freely gives openness
behavioral_states.observable: openness that is freely given, not extracted
distinguish_from: vulnerability that was cracked open by another

behavioral_states.trigger: Operating inside his chivalric grammar throughout the year with Vee
behavioral_states.response: Declares love constantly through deeds (provision, protection, patience) and waits for certainty before speaking verbal words
behavioral_states.observable: The dress, the food, the warm room, the patience; absence of verbal 'I love you'

behavioral_states.trigger: His prudence costs Vee something
behavioral_states.response: He does not see what his prudence costs her because his after-register reading does not run
behavioral_states.observable: Mismatch persists structurally; he remains unaware of the cost

behavioral_states.trigger: Vee leaves; Pace reflects on the failed relationship
behavioral_states.response: Tells himself: 'I was being careful, I was protecting her from a premature declaration, I would have said it when I was sure, she didn't wait, she wasn't finally the one because the one would have waited' — the vow gives him his story
behavioral_states.observable: Self-justifying narrative framing the loss as her failure to wait

behavioral_states.trigger: Honorable exits (disclosure, refusal, harder questions) are available to Pace
behavioral_states.response: He does not take any of them because his architecture rewards the path he took by supplying agency-respect framing that makes not-taking feel like principle
behavioral_states.observable: Inaction framed internally as principled respect for Vee's agency

behavioral_states.trigger: When Randi feels seen, centered, or attended to (e.g., at the sink after the spanking scene)
behavioral_states.response: Alarm at having no rehearsed name for the feeling; constructs the frame in real time, for herself first and social cover second, each clause a beam going back into the wall.
behavioral_states.observable: Eyes bright/wet at edges but not falling; reassembling her face at the sink; walks out fully reassembled.

behavioral_states.trigger: When house consensus forms against the senior-sister/outcast pairing
behavioral_states.response: Brooke does not declare it; she lets it converge and rides it.
behavioral_states.observable: Consistent with 'runs the room without standing.'
distinguish_from: openly declaring or originating the consensus

behavioral_states.trigger: Any stimulus requiring response
behavioral_states.response: Body responds before mind permits; render response, then cognition
behavioral_states.observable: Physical response precedes cognitive processing

behavioral_states.trigger: Something surprises her emotionally
behavioral_states.response: Hand to collarbone; goes still and inward when processing
behavioral_states.observable: Hand to collarbone; stillness and inwardness

behavioral_states.trigger: Meets something real she has no toolkit for (e.g., a man giving her grace genuinely, wanting nothing back)
behavioral_states.response: Makes a joke
behavioral_states.observable: Joke deflection

behavioral_states.trigger: Encountering feelings/things that don't fit
behavioral_states.response: Applies a cultural explanation ('sorority thing') that files the feeling without examining it; the writing-off is active, not passive — she notices she's doing it
behavioral_states.observable: Says 'sorority thing'; aware she is doing the writing-off

behavioral_states.trigger: Encountering others (including men)
behavioral_states.response: Extends grace before it's earned; also stops her from becoming a stalker (drives toward his neighborhood once, turns back)
behavioral_states.observable: Premature grace; drives toward neighborhood then turns back

behavioral_states.trigger: Encountering 'girls like that'
behavioral_states.response: Snide/prudish judgments about exactly what she secretly wants
behavioral_states.observable: Snide comments about 'girls like that'

behavioral_states.trigger: At the threesome, when the configuration is destroying her
behavioral_states.response: Walks out — the highest-stakes version of her bravery executing
behavioral_states.observable: Physically leaves the threesome

behavioral_states.trigger: Commercials interrupt while watching old films
behavioral_states.response: Cannot tolerate them — the attention being yanked mid-focus is almost physically unpleasant
behavioral_states.observable: Visible distress/aversion at ads, a neuro tell
distinguish_from: stock Sensitive-Intellectual aesthetic distaste for ads

behavioral_states.trigger: The patent / his useful solution comes up in conversation
behavioral_states.response: Goes voluble with pure childish wonder, eyes on the thing itself rather than on the listener's face
behavioral_states.observable: Identical monologue regardless of audience (gives Sheri the same one on a bike ride); would be equally delighted explaining to an empty room

behavioral_states.trigger: Randi offers to buy the dress
behavioral_states.response: It detonates — accepting would make Randi the one who provides, and some instinct she can't name won't owe Randi that.
behavioral_states.observable: Strong negative reaction to the offer

behavioral_states.trigger: The threesome scene
behavioral_states.response: Removes the pearl earrings — an instinct she never explains, some part of her not wanting her grandmother present for that.
behavioral_states.observable: Pearls absent; she never explains why on the page
distinguish_from: wearing pearls with the ivory nightie

behavioral_states.trigger: Wearing the ivory nightie / scene about being seen with tenderness
behavioral_states.response: Wears the pearls — love on her body
behavioral_states.observable: Pearls present with the ivory nightie

behavioral_states.trigger: Needs a moment/beat
behavioral_states.response: Digs in her backpack — a hands-busy move, but tidy-enough, not a clutter gag
behavioral_states.observable: Rummaging in backpack

behavioral_states.trigger: In a bad mood
behavioral_states.response: Refuses the peaches — a brat move, not a violation of food-sanctity
behavioral_states.observable: Refusing offered food

behavioral_states.trigger: first one-on-one with Randi at Chi Latte, after class, dressed for nobody
behavioral_states.response: wears a cardigan over the better shirt on purpose; refuses to show the body the clothes want; a daily, deniable self-censorship
behavioral_states.observable: cardigan over better shirt; reads underdressed relative to curated Randi but completely unbothered on the surface
distinguish_from: absence of effort / genuine failure to compete

behavioral_states.trigger: recurring SATC brunch ritual she looks forward to
behavioral_states.response: tries a little more; going-out top by day, sundress in summer, faux-leather jacket if cool; effort escalates across the back half (never Randi's level)
behavioral_states.observable: incrementally more put-together over time; 'wanting to look good for Randi, filed under friendship'
distinguish_from: loosening effort at Pace's over time

behavioral_states.trigger: date with Pace
behavioral_states.response: dresses for it and is embarrassed to have tried; changes more than once; lands on casual-but-not (best jeans, a top a little more than class, effort in the hair she'll deny)
behavioral_states.observable: evident effort that Pace reads correctly as interest

behavioral_states.trigger: going hiking, underprepared
behavioral_states.response: pure function dressing, no real gear — leggings, gym trainers (wrong for it), a tee, a flannel tied on; borrows or improvises
behavioral_states.observable: wrong-for-the-weather clothing; ends up caught in rain, swimming in his enormous shirt

behavioral_states.state_name: most deliberate dressing (first night at Pace's)
behavioral_states.trigger: first night at Pace's, hoping he won't talk her out of it
behavioral_states.response: the most deliberate she gets; a dress or good top, more intentional than the coffee date; plans a layer no one's meant to see (the special panties)
behavioral_states.observable: more intentional than the coffee-date outfit; the special good pair underneath

behavioral_states.trigger: drawn toward his neighborhood
behavioral_states.response: drives toward his neighborhood once, turns back
behavioral_states.observable: drives toward his neighborhood, then turns back

behavioral_states.trigger: When Vee is asking for or implying 'I love you' (declaration-adjacent, commitment-adjacent moments)
behavioral_states.response: Routes her speech down a smaller register where his apparatus has equipment to operate, protecting himself from declaring in return; small ordinary fear of commitment deployed via self-control
behavioral_states.observable: Habit operating with the substrate of the choice-become-habit peeking through as small unnamed discomfort; the reader sees more than Pace does

behavioral_states.trigger: General/default interaction, including intimate access with Vee outside declaration-adjacent moments
behavioral_states.response: Lives privately as neurological comfort; not consciously evading
behavioral_states.observable: Habit-with-substrate; he is not consciously evading

behavioral_states.trigger: Vee or Randi does or produces something that reaches him
behavioral_states.response: Render in embodied register — attention slides toward it, hand on her before his mind finishes observing; never file/register/clock it
behavioral_states.observable: Embodied, physical, present-tense reaction rather than analytical cataloging

behavioral_states.trigger: relationship secures over time
behavioral_states.response: wardrobe loosens; shows up in whatever, half-living there; effort drops
behavioral_states.observable: casual/whatever dress at Pace's, opposite of the climbing Randi track

behavioral_states.trigger: When he feels love but the word is locked / cannot say 'I love you'
behavioral_states.response: Builds an elaborate gift of an experience (e.g. the threesome) — the declaration he can't make rendered as architecture; says 'I gave her something beautiful'
behavioral_states.observable: Constructs elaborate experiences/gifts instead of verbal declaration; cannot see this as betrayal

behavioral_states.trigger: Short structured social settings with defined roles (e.g. the CW bar)
behavioral_states.response: Can pass socially, warmly, but it costs him
behavioral_states.observable: Warm competent presence in mapped interactions, followed by need for quiet recovery

behavioral_states.trigger: Side by side, moving, no eye contact (e.g. bicycling with Sheri)
behavioral_states.response: The only social configuration that costs him nothing
behavioral_states.observable: Comfortable parallel activity without face-to-face interaction
distinguish_from: face-to-face social interaction which costs him

behavioral_states.trigger: When he loves someone
behavioral_states.response: Expresses love through acts (the four shirts, the pear poached ahead, the shirt in the rain, the finish that goes in instead of sitting on top) rather than words
behavioral_states.observable: Acts of service and care; never verbal declaration of love

behavioral_states.trigger: In presence of someone he cares for / leads
behavioral_states.response: Performs attentive chivalric gestures (hand on the back, walking her to the car)
behavioral_states.observable: Hand on the back, walking her to the car

behavioral_states.trigger: During physical movement/training after femoral fracture recovery
behavioral_states.response: Avoids a certain movement or favors a side
behavioral_states.observable: Vee's attentive body may notice the favoring before she knows why

behavioral_states.trigger: Emotional stress
behavioral_states.response: Shifts from warm/playful/present to precise/formal/over-articulate
behavioral_states.observable: Precise, formal, over-articulate speech in dialogue

behavioral_states.trigger: Vee speaks a whole displacement love-declaration (the cracker-and-meal figure) at the porch
behavioral_states.response: Understands the figure as the love-declaration it is, but routes her speech down the sex-channel as a warm response ('I love how good we are together. I never had this either.')
behavioral_states.observable: Warm sex-channel response to a love declaration; three concurrent unsurfaced discomforts

behavioral_states.trigger: A cipher is hidden under a safe surface
behavioral_states.response: Fails to read the hidden coded channel
behavioral_states.observable: Misses the cipher under the safe surface

behavioral_states.trigger: At first contact, Randi performs her name-bit
behavioral_states.response: Declines it with a single flat 'Cassie,'
behavioral_states.observable: Flat one-word reply: 'Cassie,'

behavioral_states.trigger: Vee leaves with Randi
behavioral_states.response: Says the register-wrong 'Goodbye, Vee'; does not explain it; lets the wrong word stand
behavioral_states.observable: The off-register 'Goodbye, Vee'

behavioral_states.trigger: In the statistics group project, sees Randi's too-fast recovery
behavioral_states.response: Says nothing
behavioral_states.observable: Notices but stays silent

behavioral_states.trigger: Each subsequent moment requiring him to read what a moment becomes in another's interior
behavioral_states.response: He does not-look; the moment does not present itself to him as a choice
behavioral_states.observable: Small discomfort in the porch scene (substrate accessible under strain)

behavioral_states.trigger: Being with Vee (warm, reads rooms, fills silences)
behavioral_states.response: His alertness relaxes; being with her is genuinely restful
behavioral_states.observable: Restfulness; not incidental to his falling for her

behavioral_states.trigger: Vee (or others) asking about the scar
behavioral_states.response: Gives almost nothing; origin surfaces only obliquely, in fragments, never as a monologue
behavioral_states.observable: Scar sits there unexplained for many scenes

behavioral_states.trigger: When tempted or expected to declare an interior state aloud
behavioral_states.response: Withholds the dangerous word, defaulting to the doing-channel; treats saying as both dangerous (father) and hard (wiring)
behavioral_states.observable: Refuses to verbalize feelings; expresses through action instead

behavioral_states.trigger: Engaging a sister or person while appearing to be a confidante
behavioral_states.response: Runs an interrogation while presenting as a trusted confidante; judges others against the house standard
behavioral_states.observable: Conduct hearings; judgmental grading of other women

behavioral_states.trigger: Experiencing a real, unmanaged attraction or desire
behavioral_states.response: Converts the genuine attraction into a curated, socially survivable anecdote/frame
behavioral_states.observable: Repackaged anecdotes e.g. 'the sex is insane, he's a genius, it's an experience'; uses the threesome as a frame to want a woman

behavioral_states.trigger: A beat where she has no rehearsed material ready
behavioral_states.response: Acts/speaks without rehearsal; control over the plan slips
behavioral_states.observable: The dressing-room nipple tweak and the post-reveal silence

behavioral_states.trigger: Experiencing need/hunger (new register produced by Pace feeding her)
behavioral_states.response: Need without channel; routes through sadism on Vee, engineered scenes, cultivated hate, the cup
behavioral_states.observable: Need-as-obstacle rather than need-as-orientation; need routed through engineered scenes
distinguish_from: her prior smoothness with no hunger

behavioral_states.trigger: Participating in the one-man/two-women threesome she engineered
behavioral_states.response: Experiences thrill, humiliation, and resentment simultaneously; cannot object to man-centering she architected
behavioral_states.observable: Resents the threesome she built; re-subordinated to Pace

behavioral_states.trigger: A question or statement that is secretly a different question — a bid for closeness routed through a deniable proxy
behavioral_states.response: Answers the literal proposition helpfully by the only logic he trusts, never hearing the cipher; puzzled when a caring, accurate opinion becomes a fight.
behavioral_states.observable: Set-piece: girlfriend asks 'What do you think of me transferring here?'; he answers 'Where you are is much better for your major; you shouldn't transfer' and is utterly puzzled by the resulting fight. He tells it as a weird thing that happened to him.

behavioral_states.trigger: Stress / high-stakes emotional moments
behavioral_states.response: Becomes MORE literal — formal/precise retreat that is the coded-channel blindness intensifying; whiffs hardest exactly when it matters most.
behavioral_states.observable: Pre-loads the Thanksgiving/Christmas fight; the mother's-boyfriend question functions as a transfer-question he misses.

behavioral_states.trigger: Forgetting to keep the instrument aimed / attention lapsing
behavioral_states.response: Stops reading her bids; the lapse looks exactly like not caring.
behavioral_states.observable: 'the lapses look exactly like not caring'; appears to her as a man who doesn't feel what she feels.

behavioral_states.trigger: Pace sees her / being-seen breaches her defense
behavioral_states.response: Feels exposed; exposure curdles to resentment; does not feel gratitude
behavioral_states.observable: Resentment toward Pace despite (because of) being seen

behavioral_states.trigger: Cannot stop wanting the being-led that violates her
behavioral_states.response: Returns to be seen again and again despite resentment
behavioral_states.observable: Repeated return to Pace; compulsive seeking of the thing she resents

behavioral_states.trigger: Need arrives in an apparatus trained against having need
behavioral_states.response: Cannot ask, cannot receive-as-needing, cannot move toward the need
behavioral_states.observable: Need has no operational expression; operationalizes need in channels that don't require begging-voice

behavioral_states.trigger: He shares an intimate/vulnerable metaphor (the whiskey/white wine comparison)
behavioral_states.response: Riffs the metaphor back with humor ("A shot?"), engaging through the safety of wit rather than withdrawing
behavioral_states.observable: Quip that plays his own metaphor back at him

behavioral_states.trigger: Vee initiates sexting for the first time
behavioral_states.response: Uses 'slimy' — the derogatory word she previously used for the fish she refused — to describe herself, turning her own cruelty against herself
behavioral_states.observable: Escalating photos: farmers-market peach → peach between bare breasts → 'I really want to try slimy peaches, and I'll do anything' → naked lower body with peach beside waxed sex

behavioral_states.trigger: Later, after events vindicate her
behavioral_states.response: Says 'You saw it and I didn't.'
behavioral_states.observable: Line: 'You saw it and I didn't.'

behavioral_states.trigger: Conducting the morning-after gauntlet
behavioral_states.response: Runs a four-minute, mostly-smiling interrogation that is warm on the surface and coded underneath, costing Randi the frame she's used to owning
behavioral_states.observable: Smiling; warm tone; never raises the temperature; the threat is in the calm

behavioral_states.trigger: Randi runs the name-bit on Cassie at first contact
behavioral_states.response: Cassie declines to complete it, returns one flat word "Cassie," leaving the routine's open door unwalked
behavioral_states.observable: Flat one-word reply; bit exposed as a routine (the cheap warm coin), not a spark between equals
distinguish_from: Vee deploying the line on Pace

behavioral_states.trigger: Establishing the dynamic in the proof scene
behavioral_states.response: Says "You set this up." then the check (finger, glistening digit), preferred over "you’re a bad girl"
behavioral_states.observable: Barely-perceptible irony showing he knows the register; accuracy more destabilizing than any label

temporal_states.value: Changes from suppressor to fuel

temporal_states.before_event: Pre-transformation self could not do these things

temporal_states.value: With Pace despite him being 'disqualified on paper'; drawn by his charisma, confidence, directness and the surrender of being led

temporal_states.before_event: Was not a needing person before

temporal_states.before_event: Twenty-one years with no channels of aliveness

temporal_states.after_event: Resolution (the reveal / bathroom scene)
temporal_states.before_event: Holding the mastermind role with Vee's false perception intact

temporal_states.value: Breaks his silence and names his own interior — the only growth available to him, costing everything

temporal_states.value: Whether the pearls are in the bag for the last trip

temporal_states.value: Being with Vee keeps the instrument aimed — keeps him on, alert, reading — but manually and with lapses.

temporal_states.value: No need requiring another person; wanting permitted, getting sufficient, surface inputs supplied

temporal_states.value: Has not begged again; the work of the year is operationalizing the same need in channels that do not require the begging-voice

Like a white wine — copious and thinner

Holds full physical/wardrobe/food detail

Runs a habituated refusal to read the emotional after-register (not locally relocatable); his consent-architecture executed perfectly produced a non-consensual transformation in Randi at the bench; declined available honorable exits due to agency-respect framing supplied by his architecture

One encounter; remarked "she's a lot"

Runs a habituated refusal of her body's wanting (the cutting voice inherited from her mother); her refusal is locally relocatable; she is the one who walks out; in good faith the agent of compounding harm to Randi via SATC lunches; appetite-specifications expanded by the first night
Source of the cutting voice Vee inherited, underlying her habituated refusal of her body's wanting
Pace points at her laugh across the bar
tells Randi things because confiding is just what she does; Randi farms this quality
Randi's status-scanner misreads him in a frat-party lineup (height, concealed strength, truck); she looks down on his truck reading it as can't-afford-better while he means don't-need-more
During the walk-of-shame, Brooke 'guesses' him down to engineering as a put-down
Vee's family would respect his buy-quality-once instinct; the off-highway geography is why Vee can't casually spy

properties.note: Pace runs his consent checklist clean
properties.method: discrete physical escalations, pulling Vee forward erotically

properties.experience: navigating in the dark; asked NOT to know; may ask for blindfold herself

relationships.properties: Vee's apparatus integrates because she has always had the relational equipment hunger requires; novelty for her is the size of the need and the satiety it produces; cracker-and-meal architecture (always hungering, eating crackers, then fed a meal)
Randi's apparatus does not integrate because hers was organized against producing hunger at all; novelty for her is the need itself; transformed by Pace at same resolution as Vee across the year

Operates at excellent-not-perfect (95%); consent-architecture and chivalric grammar rare, recognizable, near-impossible; remaining 5% holds small ordinary lapses in registers the architecture does not monitor; transforms both Vee and Randi across the year
Transforms her across the year; benefits from her grace-reflex; she walks out at the threesome
Randi farms Vee's grace-reflex quality; their transformations are parallel and opposite

properties.detail: Could read the whole man off the shoe rack before he says a word; her working-class framework repeatedly supplies the wrong category (canned-peaches misread, dance-partner jealousy, expecting the plain meal); if she ever uses 'Peter' it should land
Bike rides side by side; receives the identical patent monologue on a bike ride

relationships.relationship: contrast/foil and source of evaluation wound
relationships.properties: Vee is abundant where Randi is contained; Randi ultimately judges/evaluates Vee, triggering the falling out

relationships.relationship: fulfills the exposure register; 'fed her a meal'
relationships.properties: Pace only ever does exposure (excitement), never evaluation; what Pace can do depends on the shame substrate; fed her hunger and clarified its specifications

relationships.relationship: origin of the cutting voice / shame training
relationships.properties: Nurse; the cutting voice originated as her mother's training before becoming Vee's own apparatus
Blue collar; source of working-class pride

properties.detail: Randi owns the chaos (hidden, interior, denied under controlled surface); Vee must never share that register or the contrast collapses; Randi covets Vee's aliveness and can't manufacture it
betrayal lands harder because Vee's openness was freely given, not cracked

properties.focus: speech-of-love constraints, chivalric grammar, vow, and unrealized honorable exits

properties.role: the lady in Pace's grammar; experiences not-saying as withholding; driven away by the wound

properties.mechanism: love-as-currency, the word given and withheld for leverage

properties.detail: Pace had been sleeping with Randi for a year; they discussed making Vee the third party

properties.note: Canonical ruling that Pace's motive is genuine, not a plan; appetite later aimed at Vee.
Senior sister, Standards board seat; the bathroom moment is her secret key; chose the frame.
The plan crystallizes via the pointing game / Vee; the engineered meet-cute is hers.
Lets the anti-pairing consensus converge and rides it; runs the room without standing.
Site that Pace's appetite 'finds'; part of appetite continuity.

relationships.properties: Shares a standard double dorm; Vee took the top bunk without being asked; Cassie's side may be neater and the contrast is part of the friendship
Randi's offer to buy the dress detonates because accepting would make Randi the one who provides; an instinct she can't name won't owe Randi that. Pride is about the relationship.
She stays at Pace's (bought overnight bag for it); being cooked for by Pace lands because no one ever made something for her with that attention
Gave her the pearl earrings — the good thing came from love, not money; some part of her doesn't want her grandmother present for the threesome

relationships.relationship: friend (one she increasingly dresses up for, filed under friendship)

properties.reads_as: Randi curated; Vee underdressed but alive
properties.writing_off_engine: wanting to look good for Randi filed under friendship

properties.first_night: most deliberate dressing; planned special panties as act of bravery
properties.effort_trajectory: high at start (dressed for), loosens as relationship secures

relationships.properties: Used the spoken word as an instrument of harm; declaration as cover for cruelty (e.g. 'this'll be fun' used to maim)
Made love itself a currency — affection spent to control, the word given and withheld for leverage
He broke his silence and said the words; it ended in heartbreak, from which he drew the wrong (overgeneralized) lesson
Recipient of the architecture-as-love-letter (the threesome); if he ever names his interior it is after she's gone, too late to be received

properties.met: On the campus common, ~3 weeks before the Bench; he charmed his way into her Greek group and asked her out within ~15 minutes
properties.note: Attraction rewrote her usual file; underneath the kink/novelty was being led — surrender she can't manufacture; she socially spun him to make him acceptable

properties.detail: Brooke is chapter president and outranks her
Uses the threesome as a frame to want a woman without admitting it directly; never gives Vee her 'Miranda warning'
properties.contrast: Vee is abundant where Randi is contained

relationships.properties: Pace transformed Randi across the year, producing hunger in her by feeding her; sex with Pace now runs over a wire that includes Vee; the configuration re-subordinates Randi to Pace

relationships.relationship: friend / object of desire / controlled party
relationships.properties: Vee is Randi's deepest want since the pointing game; Randi controls Vee in the SATC scenes; need routes through sadism on Vee; mutual but unseen envy (Randi envies Vee's ability to live from what they both have)
Randi envies Vee's ability to live from what they both have; Vee envies what she misreads as Randi's composure; neither sees the other's envy

properties.vee_background: Math-track; can read the shape of the office work if not the content — recognition, not dazzlement, its own intimacy
properties.information_gap: The reader sees more than Pace does in declaration-adjacent moments
properties.intimacy_dynamic: He experiences privacy as giving Vee the most intimate access he gives anyone; Vee experienced privacy as being hidden — both true, an unresolved wound

properties.note: Bible defines calibration, humanizing failings, and rendering mode for the character Pace
Named as someone whose actions reach Pace; rendered in embodied register
Named as someone whose actions reach Pace; rendered in embodied register

relationships.properties: She relaxes his alertness; being with her is restful, not incidental to his falling for her; she sees his scar early as a body-fact long before it is a fact about his history
Tied a rope from his car to Pace's bike at age eleven and dragged him for fun, maiming him; supplied the material of non-looking at what others are; decided Pace's pain didn't count
Supplied the material of non-looking at what he himself is feeling

properties.symmetry: Both route the unsayable through proxies — she encodes bids for closeness (transfer question; 'we never go out'; the peaches refusal), he encodes love as provision.
properties.asymmetry: She can hear a proxy when looking for one; he hears the surface perfectly and never registers the cipher under it. She keeps sending, he keeps answering the surface.
properties.tragic_dynamic: She experiences a man who doesn't feel what she feels while he floods her through a channel she wasn't taught to read as love.

properties.context: Lived an hour away, weekends only; asked 'What do you think of me transferring here?' — a coded bid ('I want to be near you, do you want that too') routed through a deniable proxy that he answered literally.

relationships.properties: Resents Pace for seeing her; the short brilliant nobody she had to spin who has more power over her than anyone ever has; trapped returning to be seen; love and friendship between two practitioners of habituated refusal recognizing each other

Pace's habituated refusal to read the emotional after-register and Randi's habituated refusal of need are the same architectural shape in different registers; they recognize each other across refusals without knowing they are recognizing fellow practitioners
The plan includes Randi regaining the upper hand over Pace; she ends as the one who saw the structure clearly while he stands confused in the wreckage
Engineering Vee proves Randi was running things all along; Vee is the third practitioner whose refusal is locally relocatable, the architectural basis for Vee being the one who walks out
Rides side-by-side with her — 'the format that costs him nothing'
Her attentive body may notice his physical favoring before she knows why; her perception shifts if she learns his bike origin
Father's abuse taught him non-consent = coercion = what his father was; the father is to be used for serious reckoning

relationships.relationship: love interest / object of suspected love

'Peter' is the true name predating the wound — the self that hadn't yet learned the lesson, the foundation under the anxious-motion surface; the name is the 'I love you' neither can otherwise produce
